mca_village.title: Find and enter an MCA-enhanced village

subtitle.text: Every civilization began with meeting another one.

description: The Silk Road was not a road.
It was a network of people who wrote things down
and left them where others could find them.
MCA Reborn replaces vanilla villagers with full NPCs.
They have names. Relationships. Memories of you.
They trade in cogs, not emeralds.
Every village you find from here forward is inhabited.
Not scenery. Not a loot chest.
People who made different choices than you.
→ Find and enter an MCA-enhanced village [check]
